expectations.evidence: Step 0: 'Read the Sync Workflow... File: <skill-path>/workflows/sync-bmad-documents.md' and 'File: <skill-path>/references/sync-mapping-guide.md'

expectations.text: Uses sync.mjs status to check the document's current state
Detects or confirms the document type as 'epic'
expectations.evidence: Step 2: 'Given the file is located in docs/epics/ and named auth-epic.md, this is almost certainly an epic document type. Confirm by inspecting the document for epic detection signals.'

expectations.text: Asks the user which Jira project to sync to
expectations.evidence: Step 4: 'Target: Which Jira project key? Answer: DO — specified in the task.' and 'the workflow says to confirm with the user before mutating. Present these choices and get confirmation.'

expectations.text: Asks whether to create a new epic or link to an existing one
expectations.evidence: Step 4: 'Action: Create new ticket/page, or link to existing one? Answer: Create new'

expectations.text: Uses sync.mjs link with appropriate flags (--type epic --project <KEY> --create or --ticket <KEY>)
Confirms that jira_ticket_id was added to the document frontmatter
expectations.evidence: Step 7: 'Read docs/epics/auth-epic.md and confirm jira_ticket_id was added to the frontmatter' with example showing 'jira_ticket_id: DO-XXX'

expectations.text: References sync-mapping-guide.md if field mapping is needed
expectations.evidence: Step 0: 'File: <skill-path>/references/sync-mapping-guide.md' and Step 5c: 'following the schema in references/sync-mapping-guide.md'
